untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a directional forecaster model with accuracy metrics (hit_rate, p-value, MAE) that are not available as standard price-based indicators. These are statistical validation criteria for a predictive model, not real-time market indicators. Hit rate >= 55%, p-value <= 0.05, and MAE <= 1.0% cannot be expressed using only price action, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian channels, pivots, volume ratios, or bar properties. This signal requires backtesting framework integration with a separate directional forecasting model.
translation_notes: This is a META-SIGNAL that describes when to BUILD a strategy (after a forecaster validates itself), not a direct trading signal. It requires integration with a machine learning model or statistical test harness outside standard technical indicator scope. The parameters provided (hit_rate_threshold: 0.55, p_value_threshold: 0.05, max_mae_percent: 0.01, min_sample_size: 250) are validation thresholds for model performance, not market conditions.
